approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 treats a recognised asset or liability as an eligible hedged item category, making the fair value hedge model a canonical peer model for foreign-currency risk on a recognised monetary item.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 separately recognises the cash flow hedge model for foreign-currency exposures, including highly probable forecast transactions and qualifying variability in cash flows.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9, IAS 21 and IFRIC 16 establish net investment hedging as a distinct top-level hedge accounting model for foreign-currency risk in consolidated financial statements.
